full_text:
Yang Yue
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Yuewas born in Hanyang. Imprisoned by Ma Chao after helping Wei Kang’s unsuccessful defence. Released by his cousin. Yang Yue was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
